title: Issue accessing LastCustomerID variable in workflow
symptom: The workflow fails to access the LastCustomerID variable when executing the Get Customers node, causing breaks in the data path.
applies_when: Using a loop to paginate API calls
Set node is used to define LastCustomerID
not_this_if: LastCustomerID is not defined in a Set node
root_cause: The LastCustomerID variable must be set immediately before the Get Customers node without any intervening steps. If other nodes are executed in between, the variable becomes inaccessible.
fix_steps: Ensure the Set node for LastCustomerID is executed directly before the Get Customers node.
In the Reset-LC-ID node, reference the last item of the loop to get the correct LastCustomerID using the expression {{ $(‘Replace Me’).last().json.KundID }}.
Set the Reset-LC-ID node to 'execute once' to ensure it runs correctly.
agent_instruction: Adjust the workflow to ensure the LastCustomerID variable is set immediately before the Get Customers node.
